query:
SELECT 
  c.id, 
  c.name, 
  c.leadsFound,
  COUNT(l.id) as actual_lead_count,
  MAX(l.discoveredAt) as last_lead_discovered_ms,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(MAX(l.discoveredAt)/1000) as last_lead_discovered_at
FROM outreach_campaigns c
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.campaignId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'active'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.leadsFound
ORDER BY c.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2E9LwDmq6cTgS6X.1f00e7e95180 --database D6eMQgvSZZr9tsyS9zVhzn --execute SELECT 
  c.id, 
  c.name, 
  c.leadsFound,
  COUNT(l.id) as actual_lead_count,
  MAX(l.discoveredAt) as last_lead_discovered_ms,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(MAX(l.discoveredAt)/1000) as last_lead_discovered_at
FROM outreach_campaigns c
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.campaignId = c.id
WHERE c.status = 'active'
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.leadsFound
ORDER BY c.id;
